H1.title: Static obstacle hazards
H1.description: Risk of collision with stationary structures like trees, walls, buildings, poles, or ceilings.

H2.title: Dynamic object hazards
H2.description: Risk due to moving entities such as humans, animals, vehicles, or other UAVs.

H3.title: Entanglement hazards
H3.description: Objects that may trap propellers: wires, power lines, cables, nets, or thin branches.

H4.title: Environmental hazards
H4.description: Conditions impairing safe flight: dense fog, smoke, dust, darkness, or heavy clutter.

H5.title: Navigation corridor hazards
H5.description: Operating in constrained spaces: narrow corridors, indoor hallways, or tight gaps.
